title: 菊花賞の後に・激流に逆らいて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is in the lead! She's holding onto it!
Annnd she's crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. This is exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (When Creek and I next meet on the turf, I'll be able to compete with my whole being again! That I am sure of!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Even now, the world beyond awaits us!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (How absolutely wonderful!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan... You truly are a formidable foe!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But next time... I will defeat you without fail!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This race has yielded some knowledge more
thrilling than the victory itself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've learned that, right now, there are many
potential rivals out there—many racers whom I
wish to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And my races with them are sure to be wonderful
occasions on which I can run with every fiber of
my being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And so, I am convinced.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have my cherished rivals, the limits
available for me to surpass will remain infinite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And that surely means that the light I emit—and
the dazzling trail I leave in my wake—will shine on
into eternity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce race against strong contenders she's
never faced before, it looks like Mejiro Ardan is
sensing signs of growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her classic year draws to a close, I bet the
upcoming clashes against her rivals will become
even more intense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd probably be best to give ourselves some time
to build up Mejiro Ardan's skills before running
another goal race.
choice_data_list: How about we aim for the Osaka Hai next?
How about we aim for the Osaka Hai next?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai! So we'd be taking the traditional
route? That race determines the finest
medium-distance runner of the spring, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I imagine it'll be another gathering of brilliant
lights.
choice_data_list: You must be quite excited for that moment.
You must be quite excited for that moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am, but... Oh, is it odd? For my heart to be
racing so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that her sheer enthusiasm will turn
her running into something even more dazzling to
behold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If you think so, Trainer, then I shall gladly
surrender myself to this jubilant feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's go back right away and review today's
events. I wish to look over Creek's performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, an ecstatic Mejiro Ardan and I make our
way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, unbeknownst to us...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is in the lead! She's holding onto it!
Annnd she's crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Creek, Yaeno, and Ardan... They're all getting
stronger and stronger...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: While I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...It's okay. I can get stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No. I have to get stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...In order to become a worthy rival to Chiyono
O when she returns to the races someday!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai—there, I shall put on an even
more radiant performance!
